# Performance Checklist: PR Blast-Radius Review Action

**Purpose**: Validate requirements quality for warm-cache runtime target, cache validation cost, measurement protocol, narrative/runtime bounds, and dogfood evidence.
**Created**: 2026-07-15
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md), [plan.md](../plan.md), [quickstart.md](../quickstart.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Is the warm-cache performance target quantified with a median and a maximum duration? [Completeness, Spec SC-007, SC-016]
- [x] CHK002 Are eligibility rules documented for which dogfood runs count toward the warm-cache sample? [Completeness, Spec FR-048-FR-049]
- [x] CHK003 Are cache-hit, cache-miss, stale-cache, and rebuild paths separated so they are not mixed into the warm-cache metric? [Completeness, Spec SC-011, FR-048]
- [x] CHK004 Are narrative-disabled requirements included in the binding warm-cache measurement path? [Completeness, Spec FR-048]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK005 Is the duration measurement window defined from action start through durable deterministic report delivery? [Clarity, Spec FR-049]
- [x] CHK006 Is the minimum sample count defined clearly enough for reproducible reporting? [Clarity, Spec FR-048, SC-016]
- [x] CHK007 Are excluded run reasons required so performance evidence cannot silently mix cold-cache and warm-cache paths? [Clarity, Spec FR-049, Data Model Performance Sample]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK008 Do performance requirements align with the cache-correctness rule that invalid restored state must rebuild instead of being used for speed? [Consistency, Spec FR-013-FR-015, FR-027-FR-029]
- [x] CHK009 Do quickstart evidence requirements align with success criteria for five warm-cache samples and median reporting? [Consistency, Quickstart, Spec SC-016]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK010 Are dogfood workflow assumptions documented as the binding performance evidence source? [Dependency, Spec FR-020, Plan Dogfooding, Quickstart]
